title: orbexilum onobrychis
intro: Orbexilum onobrychis, also known as the pink milkwort or wild strawberry, is a perennial plant native to North America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Orbexilum onobrychis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce swelling. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
